{{Quote|My younger sister joined a religious sect on Devon Four. When they refused to pay taxes Coruscant slapped an embargo on them. When a plague struck the colony, they were going to die, every woman, man, and child. No one would do a thing.|Sheeka Tull|<ref name="TCD" />}}
'''Devon Four''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] aligned with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out, the government of the planet—members of a religious sect—refused to pay taxes. The planet was subsequently embargoed by the Republic, which even prevented medicine being delivered to the planet during an outbreak of plague. [[Smuggler/Legends|Smugglers]] organized by [[Sheeka Tull]] later broke the embargo.

==Description==
Devon Four was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TCD" /> in its eponymously named [[Devon system/Legends|star system]],<ref name="TCD" /> located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="Atlas" /> and the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It was part of the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]], bracketed by the [[Fest system/Legends|Fest system]] on its coreward side and the [[Generis system/Legends|Generis system]] on its rimward side.<ref name="Atlas" />

==History==
In the latter years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Devon Four was inhabited by members of a religious sect,<ref name="TCD" /> who governed the planet. When the government refused to pay taxes to the Republic, the planet was embargoed, preventing any [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traffic from reaching the planet.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|187|Devon Four}}</ref> Shortly after this, an infectious plague broke out on the planet, threatening the life of the entire populace;<ref name="TCD" /> unrelenting, the Republic blocked shipments of the appropriate antidote.<ref name="CSWE" />

One of the residents of Devon Four was a [[Sheeka Tull's sister|member]] of the [[Tull family]]. Her sister, [[Sheeka Tull]], then living on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], heard of the plague,<ref name="TCD" /> and arranged for smugglers to break the Republic embargo,<ref name="CSWE" /> saving the life of her sister and the entire populace. Tull herself was caught and sentenced to ten years of labor on a work planet, although this was substituted for aid given to Republic forces on Ord Cestus during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TCD" />

==Inhabitants==
Devon Four was inhabited by members of a religious sect, including Sheeka Tull's sister, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] originally from [[Atrivis 7]]. She left the planet, following the outbreak of the plague.<ref name="TCD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Devon Four was mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'', published in [[2004]] and written by [[Steven Barnes]].<ref name="TCD" />
